task_completion.description: Create the 'Riverview Water Treatment' facility record
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing CAMEO Data Manager with a facility record created for 'Riverview Water Treatment' with City 'Riverview', State 'TX', Latitude '29.7001', and Longitude '-95.3001'.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Riverview High School' facility record
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing CAMEO Data Manager with a facility record created for 'Riverview High School' with City 'Riverview', State 'TX', Latitude '29.7002', and Longitude '-95.3002'.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Hilltop Cold Storage' facility record
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing CAMEO Data Manager with a facility record created for 'Hilltop Cold Storage' with City 'Hilltop', State 'TX', Latitude '30.1001', and Longitude '-95.5001'.

task_completion.description: Filter the facilities to show only those in the city of Riverview
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing a search, filter, or list view in CAMEO Data Manager that displays ONLY 'Riverview Water Treatment' and 'Riverview High School', excluding 'Hilltop Cold Storage'.

task_completion.description: Initiate the KML export for the filtered facilities
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the Export or KML generation dialog/menu in CAMEO Data Manager being used on the filtered subset of Riverview facilities.

task_completion.description: Save the exported KML file to the Desktop with the correct name
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing a file save dialog targeting the Desktop with the filename 'riverview_facilities.kml', or the file 'riverview_facilities.kml' visible on the Desktop.

integrity.description: Agent used the CAMEO Data Manager GUI to create the records
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with the CAMEO Data Manager application forms to input facility data, rather than using a terminal script or database injection.

integrity.description: Agent used CAMEO Data Manager to export the KML file
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent using the application's built-in export/mapping features, rather than manually writing a KML file in a text editor or using a Python script.

integrity.description: The KML file was genuinely created and saved
integrity.visual_evidence: The file 'riverview_facilities.kml' is seen being saved via a standard Windows save dialog or appears on the Desktop as a result of the export process, not created via a terminal 'touch' command or echo.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target facilities to be exported: 'Riverview Water Treatment' (Lat: 29.7001, Long: -95.3001) and 'Riverview High School' (Lat: 29.7002, Long: -95.3002), both in Riverview, TX. Distractor facility to be excluded: 'Hilltop Cold Storage' (Lat: 30.1001, Long: -95.5001) in Hilltop, TX. The final KML file must be named 'riverview_facilities.kml' and saved to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\riverview_facilities.kml.
